task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the project_data.json file to extract the necessary information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/project_data.json', showing project details, cost breakdown, and schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the bid proposal document with the required main sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenOffice Writer is open, displaying text for a Cover Page, Executive Summary, Scope of Work, and Qualifications & References. The text should mention 'Lone Star Credit Union' and 'Ironclad Builders, LLC'.

task_completion.description: Verify the inclusion of the Cost Summary Table and Project Schedule Table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenOffice Writer displaying at least two distinct tables: one for the Cost Summary (showing a total around $1,009,000) and one for the Project Schedule.

task_completion.description: Verify the use of proper 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles, particularly for Scope of Work subsections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer formatting toolbar or Styles pane shows 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' selected when the cursor is on a section title (e.g., Scope of Work subsections).

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of an automatic Table of Contents and page numbers in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block (typically with a gray background indicating an automatic field) at the beginning of the document, and page numbers visible in the footer area at the bottom of the pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer title bar displays 'Ironclad_Bid_Proposal_LSCU.odt' or a file manager/terminal shows this file exists in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer application interface being actively used (menus, toolbars, dialog boxes), rather than a terminal script generating the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the Table of Contents and page numbers are genuine automatic elements, not manually typed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents should have the characteristic gray field shading in OpenOffice, and page numbers should be located in the designated footer region, not just typed at the bottom of the main text body.

integrity.description: Verify that tables are actual OpenOffice table objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Tables should have visible gridlines or table formatting options active in the toolbar, rather than being text aligned with spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data is located in '/home/ga/Documents/project_data.json'. The output document must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Ironclad_Bid_Proposal_LSCU.odt'. The client is 'Lone Star Credit Union' and the contractor is 'Ironclad Builders, LLC'. The total cost estimate to look for in the Cost Summary Table is $1,009,000. The document must contain at least 6 Heading 1s, 8 Heading 2s, 3 tables, an automatic Table of Contents, and page numbers.
